/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/CSP_PROJECT.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CSP_PROJECT.dir/src/csp_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CSP_PROJECT.dir/src/ecat_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CSP_PROJECT.dir/src/ecat_master.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CSP_PROJECT.dir/src/cst_control.cpp.o -o CSP_PROJECT  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/etherlab/lib /usr/local/etherlab/lib/libethercat.so
